heading: Transfer of a prisoner to State authority
label: 3623 Transfer of a prisoner to State authority
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor a prior section 3623, applicable to offenses committed prior to , see note set out preceding .Nov. 1, 1987section 3601 of this title

Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title

children.text: the transfer has been requested by the Governor or other executive authority of the State;
the State has presented to the Director a certified copy of the indictment, information, or judgment of conviction; and
the Director finds that the transfer would be in the public interest.
